metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_5499
metadata.comment:
Rationale: "The KIBRA/WWC1 signal in dendrites was in close apposition with the presynaptic marker Bassoon and co-localized partially with the postsynaptic protein ProSAP2/Shank3, suggesting a postsynaptic localization of KIBRA" in primary cultures of rat hippocampal neurons at 17DIV (legend to Fig. 4).

Moreover Fig. 4B documents the enrichment of Kibra immunoreactivity in postsynaptic density biochemical fractions prepared from adult rat brain.. Experimental description: "Cell culture experiments of rat hippocampal primary neurons (embryonic days-18-21; E18-21) were performed..." (p. 1166) AND "... biochemical purification experiments revealed that KIBRA is a component of the PSD in rat brain." (p. 1166).

antibody;
"KIBRA antibodies were generated by the immunization of rabbits with a gluthation-S-transferase (GST) fusion protein containing amino acids 661-796 of human KIBRA. Polyclonal KIBRA antiserum was purified by affinity chromatography and was tested for specificity as described elsewhere (Duning et al., 2008)."

checks.label: OWL Consistency
